title: Global Gizmos 55229 Aquarium Jellyfish Lamp/Colour Changing LEDs/Calming Sensory Light/USB or Battery Powered/Great for Kids & Adults
features: CALMING JELLYFISH LAMP – Enjoy the atmosphere created by this Jellyfish Lamp any time you need to relax and de-stress. The lamp features two colourful artificial jellyfish that swim up and down with the lamp’s current, surrounded by a solid black-coloured square exterior that makes it perfect for use at night.

COLOUR CHANGING LEDS – The glowing lamp steadily changes its colours over time when switched on, allowing the jellyfish to glow in a variety of different colours to create a mesmerising tropical sea effect.

DUAL POWERED – Power the lamp in two different ways for your convenience. Plug the lamp into a USB socket via the provided cable, or take it with you anywhere by powering it with 3x AA batteries (not included with the lamp).

SENSORY LIGHTS – The lamp’s selection of warm lights, along with the smooth movement of the jellyfish and the quiet hum of the motor, makes this lamp an ideal sensory toy for children and adults alike to help prevent overstimulation.
GLOBAL GIZMOS – Global Gizmos has a wide range of unique and entertaining toys, gadgets, and classic games, all of which can be found at the Global Gizmos store on Amazon.
description: Product Description With Colour Changing Lights Calming Jellyfish Lamp Immerse yourself in the soothing atmosphere created by this Jellyfish Lamp whenever you need to de-stress. This lamp features two colourful artificial jellyfish which realistically swim up and down in the current of the water, providing a smooth motion for you to focus on. The lamp itself features a vibrant multi-coloured acrylic exterior, as well as a selection of 8 different light colours thanks to the built-in LEDs. Previous page Vibrant Jellyfish Two colourful fake jellyfish are featured within the lamp, which calmly move around in the water. Colour Changing The lamp can shift between a total of 8 different colours, allowing you to choose your favourite. Dual Powered Power the lamp either via the included USB cable, or via 3x AA batteries for a portable choice. Easy Operation Activate the lamp or change its colours by simply pressing the power button on its base. Sensory Lamp With warm lights, smooth movements, and a quiet motor, this lamp is ideal for reducing stimulation. Next page 1 Vibrant Jellyfish 2 Colour Changing 3 Dual Powered 4 Easy Operation 5 Sensory Lamp
